codeReview.summary: The icon/grid follow-up adds the new `PlatformIcon` component, threads it through the sidebar/header/badge surfaces, and changes the skill lists to a responsive `lg:grid-cols-2` layout with card-height normalization. The implementation is well covered by the new PlatformIcon tests and I did not find a layout or navigation regression in the reviewed diff.

summary: Pass. The platform icon and dual-column grid work lands cleanly and I did not identify an actionable bug in the reviewed changes.
